patch.value: Action-scoped MCP parameter descriptions: split shared name/target description per action (schema vs profile)

CodeRabbit (PR #404) noted the shared 'name'/'target' parameter description in the pm_run aggregated action schema (src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-parameter-tables.ts) enumerates BOTH schema uses (type/status/field key) and profile uses (profile name) for every action that takes name, so the schema action's name mentions profiles and vice versa. The narrow tools (pm_schema, pm_profile) already carry action-specific name descriptions; only the generic pm_run per-action schema shares one table entry. Fixing this cleanly requires action-scoped parameter description overrides in the contracts system (a parameter table keyed by action+param, not just param). Deferred from #404 (pm-j1fj) as a focused contracts enhancement.
